title: MAHATRANSCO Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 50 Electrician Posts
description: Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company (MAHATRANSCO) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the 50 vacancies for Electrician Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass, ITI can grab this chance and apply for the MAHATRANSCO Notification 2026. Here, we include the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply online before the last date of app...
